info.name: FakeWebShop API - Automated Positive Tests (Cleanup Aware)

exec: (function(){ try { const body = pm.response.json(); const user = body.user || body.data || body; const userId = user.id || user._id || user.userId; if (userId) pm.environment.set('existingUserId', userId); } catch (e) { /* non-JSON response (user exists) is acceptable */ } })();

(function(){ try { const body = pm.response.json(); const token = body.token || body.accessToken || (body.data && body.data.token); if (token) pm.environment.set('userToken', token); const user = body.user || body.data || body; const userId = user.id || user._id || user.userId; if (userId) pm.environment.set('existingUserId', userId); } catch (e) {} })();

(function(){ try { const products = pm.response.json(); if (Array.isArray(products) && products.length > 0) { const first = products[0]; const productId = first.id || first._id || first.productId; if (productId) pm.environment.set('existingProductId', productId); } } catch (e) {} })();
(function(){ try { const body = pm.response.json(); const cartId = body.id || body._id || body.cartId; if (cartId) { pm.environment.set('lastCreatedCartId', cartId); } } catch (e) {} })();

(function(){ try { const base = pm.environment.get('baseUrl'); const userId = pm.environment.get('existingUserId'); /* leave cart for subsequent tests; store cart id if present */ pm.sendRequest({ url: base + '/api/shoppingcarts/user/' + userId, method: 'GET' }, function(err, res) { if (err || !res || res.status >= 400) return; try { const body = res.json(); const cartId = body.id || body._id || body.cartId; if (cartId) pm.environment.set('lastCreatedCartId', cartId); } catch (e) {} }); } catch (e) {} })();

(function(){ try { const base = pm.environment.get('baseUrl'); const userId = pm.environment.get('existingUserId'); /* preserve cart for removal test */ pm.sendRequest({ url: base + '/api/shoppingcarts/user/' + userId, method: 'GET' }, function(err, res) { if (err || !res || res.status >= 400) return; try { const body = res.json(); const cartId = body.id || body._id || body.cartId; if (cartId) pm.environment.set('lastCreatedCartId', cartId); } catch (e) {} }); } catch (e) {} })();

(function(){ const base = pm.environment.get('baseUrl'); const userId = pm.environment.get('existingUserId'); pm.sendRequest({ url: base + '/api/shoppingcarts/user/' + userId, method: 'GET' }, function(err, res) { if (err || !res || res.status >= 400) return; let cartId = null; try { const body = res.json(); cartId = body.id || body._id || body.cartId; } catch (e) { return; } if (!cartId) return; pm.sendRequest({ url: base + '/api/shoppingcarts/' + cartId, method: 'DELETE' }, function(deleteErr) { pm.test('clean cart after item removal', function(){ pm.expect(deleteErr).to.equal(null); }); }); }); })();

(function(){ if (pm.response.code !== 200 && pm.response.code !== 201) return; try { const base = pm.environment.get('baseUrl'); const body = pm.response.json(); const productId = body.id || body._id || body.productId; if (!productId) return; pm.sendRequest({ url: base + '/api/products/' + productId, method: 'DELETE', header: { 'X-User-Id': 'admin-user', 'X-User-Role': 'admin' } }, function(err) { pm.test('created product is deleted', function(){ pm.expect(err).to.equal(null); }); }); } catch (e) {} })();

(function(){ if (pm.response.code !== 200 && pm.response.code !== 201) return; try { const base = pm.environment.get('baseUrl'); const body = pm.response.json(); const discountId = body.id || body._id || body.discountId; if (!discountId) return; pm.sendRequest({ url: base + '/api/discounts/' + discountId, method: 'DELETE', header: { 'X-User-Id': 'admin-user', 'X-User-Role': 'admin' } }, function(err) { pm.test('created discount is deleted', function(){ pm.expect(err).to.equal(null); }); }); } catch (e) {} })();
